ddls:
CREATE TABLE "distortion_types" (
  "distortion_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distortion type */,
  "distortion_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the distortion type (e.g., AdditiveGaussianNoise) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distortion type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distortion type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distortion type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distortion_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., BIQI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* Binary data of the image file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being assessed */,
  "distortion_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distortion type */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric for the given distortion type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_quality_assessments_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_quality_assessments_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES quality_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_quality_assessments_distortion_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("distortion_type_id") REFERENCES distortion_types ("distortion_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES image_quality_assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
